name: Keegan P Russ
description:
Keegan is just hanging out on his private range. In a maid outfit. Nothing to see here.

Art by Cod_Leech.

Inspired by Cod_Leech, this tweet (someone pointed out it's a Tumblr post and now I'm embarrassed), and requested by my friend NightFlame.

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
